records.question: Which tourist attractions are galleries where you can get there by walking?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
JOIN tourist_attraction_features ON tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id = tourist_attraction_features.tourist_attraction_id
WHERE ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'gallery' AND tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'walk'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT tourist_attractions.tourist_attraction_id
FROM tourist_attractions
JOIN ref_attraction_types ON tourist_attractions.attraction_type_code = ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_code
WHERE ref_attraction_types.attraction_type_description = 'Gallery' AND tourist_attractions.How_to_Get_There = 'Walking'

WHERE tourist_attractions.how_to_get_there = 'bus' AND photos.name = 'game1' AND photos.filename = '702' AND locations.location_name = 'The Barnstormer' AND locations.address = '3374 Sarina Manor' AND tourist_attractions.name = 'impressions de France'

WHERE ta.Name = 'Impressions de France'

  AND l.Address = '3374 Sarina Manor'
  AND p.Name = 'game1'
